name: Minestrone Soup#2 (Diabetic)
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups tomatoes, canned, Italian Plum -- crushed
4 cups cannellini beans, drained or any white bean
1 Package green beans, Italian cut (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stockpot, sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until soft but not brown (about 10 minutes).
2. Add remaining ingredients except Italian green beans, pasta, and Parmesan cheese.
3. Bring to boil; cover; reduce heat and simmer for 1 hour.
4. Stir in beans, pasta, and half the Parmesan cheese. Simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Taste for seasoning. Serve hot or at room temperature. Serve in bowls with remaining Parmesan cheese.
